summary: Iteration 92 - Full Health Check Complete. Tested all public pages, navigation, authentication flows, and backend APIs. All 16 backend tests pass. All 15+ public pages load correctly. Mobile navigation works. Login modal with Google and Email/Password options functional. Protected routes correctly require authentication.

public_pages_navigation.details: All 15+ public pages load correctly: Landing, How It Works, Appeal Statistics, Legal Resources, Legal Framework, Forms, Glossary, Lawyers, FAQ, Contact, About, Terms, Professional Summary, Caselaw Search, Statistics, Success Stories

mobile_navigation.details: Mobile menu button works, all 11 mobile nav links present, mobile sign in button functional

desktop_dropdown_navigation.details: More dropdown opens correctly with all navigation items visible

footer_links.details: Footer present with 15 links, 'Founded by Debra King' branding, 'Australian Law Only • Not legal advice' disclaimer

login_modal.details: Sign In button opens modal with Google Sign In and Email/Password form options

protected_routes.details: All protected routes (/dashboard, /cases/:id, /admin, /cases/:id/reports/:id, /cases/:id/reports/:id/barrister) correctly redirect to landing page when not authenticated

backend_auth_protection.details: All protected endpoints (/api/cases, /api/cases/:id, /api/cases/:id/reports, /api/cases/:id/grounds, /api/cases/:id/reports/barrister-view, /api/cases/:id/progress-analysis) return 401 when not authenticated

contact_form.details: Contact form validates required fields and accepts valid submissions

auth_endpoints.details: /api/auth/me returns 401 when not authenticated, /api/auth/login and /api/auth/register endpoints exist

light_mode_enforcement.details: No dark class on body or html elements - light mode enforced on public pages

legal_disclaimer_banner.details: 'NOT LEGAL ADVICE' banner present on landing page with 'Read full terms' link

branding.details: 'Founded by Debra King' present in footer and About page

critical_code_review_comments: All public pages load correctly with proper light mode enforcement
Navigation (desktop dropdown, mobile menu, footer) all functional
Authentication flow works correctly with Google and Email/Password options
Protected routes properly redirect unauthenticated users
Backend APIs properly protected with 401 responses for unauthenticated requests
Legal disclaimer and branding requirements met
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 92 completed full health check. All public pages, navigation, authentication, and backend APIs working correctly. Key findings: 1) All 15+ public pages load without errors. 2) Mobile and desktop navigation functional. 3) Login modal with Google and Email/Password options works. 4) All protected routes require authentication. 5) Backend APIs properly protected. 6) Light mode enforced on public pages. 7) Legal disclaimer and branding requirements met. Note: Authenticated flows (case detail, reports, barrister view, grounds, progress) require Emergent Google Auth login to test fully.
